title: Add troubleshooting information about running a rootless containers.
body:
Add a problem statement about shadow-utils and missing entries from
/etc/subuid and /etc/subgid.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2269) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I'm done nit-picking, will be very helpful when complete.  Thanks @rhatdan !
